mysql-import-sql/pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 17 to Java 21.
mysql-import-sql/pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 21, so the compiler must be configured to generate bytecode compatible with Java 21; otherwise, it will compile for Java 17.

mysql-import-sql/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit release configuration to the maven-compiler-plugin configuration block.
mysql-import-sql/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the plugin explicitly uses Java 21 release settings, reinforcing the target JDK version.
